description:
Offered: Spring
This course explores the process of using data to answer applied questions. Students develop skills to produce clear, thorough, and appropriate data analyses. Topics include cleaning and exploring data; building and evaluating regression, classification, and clustering models; and communicating results. Students will write short computer programs to do reproducible analyses.
Prerequisite(s): MATH 1250 or MATH 1300 or MATH 1700 or MATH 1800 or MATH 2800
Meets General Education Requirement(s): PL
prerequisites: MATH 1250 or MATH 1300 or MATH 1700 or MATH 1800 or MATH 2800
